summary: Iteration 252 - Pre-deployment regression test. Tested: login flows (admin + Matt + wrong password), admin.py split (admin_users.py, admin_hierarchy.py, admin_helpers.py all working), impersonation serialization fix, role update, all 6 admin GET endpoints, master-feed performance, PATCH base64 rejection, profile photo multipart upload, /contact/new route, my-account.tsx with ProfilePhotoUpload. 21/21 backend tests pass. All 5 frontend Playwright flows pass.

minor.issue: OSError from Pillow not caught — broken/corrupted images return 500 instead of 400. Wrap upload_image() call in try/except OSError and return 400.

action_items: Optional: Wrap upload_image() in try/except in profile.py line 185 to return 400 on broken images instead of 500
Optional: Remove orphaned convert_to_individual() function in admin_users.py (line 705) that has no route decorator

Optional: Rename one of the two `reactivate_user` functions in admin_users.py (lines 511 and 779) to avoid naming confusion (both are registered correctly as PUT/POST but same name in Python is confusing)
critical_code_review_comments: admin_users.py: convert_to_individual (line 705) is an orphaned async function — missing @router.post/put decorator. Not accessible via HTTP but harmless.

admin_users.py: Two functions named `reactivate_user` — line 510 (PUT) and line 779 (POST). Python rebinds name to the second, but FastAPI registers both routes at decoration time. Routes both work but naming is confusing.
profile.py: upload_image() call (line 185) not wrapped in try/except — OSError from PIL (broken images) propagates as 500. Should catch and return 400.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (admin login→/home PASS, Matt login→/home NOT onboarding PASS, wrong password error PASS, /contact/new route PASS, /my-account with ProfilePhotoUpload PASS)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All regression tests pass for this pre-deployment iteration. Key verification points: (1) admin.py split into admin_users.py/admin_hierarchy.py/admin_helpers.py — all endpoints working, (2) impersonation POST /admin/users/{id}/impersonate returns success:true with clean JSON serialization (no ObjectId errors), (3) Matt (mjeast1985@gmail.com, onboarding_complete: null) correctly goes to /home not /onboarding, (4) /contact/new is a valid Expo Router route rendering the new contact form, (5) my-account.tsx correctly uses ProfilePhotoUpload component, (6) PATCH /users/{id} rejects base64 photo_url with 400, (7) master-feed responds < 2s at limit=25.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending is mocked in test env

backend_api_tests: test_get_roles — PASSED (200, roles with super_admin present)
frontend_playwright_tests: Matt login (mjeast1985@gmail.com / NavyBean1!, onboarding_complete: null) → /home NOT /onboarding — PASSED
Wrong password → 'Invalid email or password' shown on login page — PASSED
/contact/new route renders New Contact form — PASSED
